programme.title: What Went Wrong: Countdown to Disaster
programme.desc: The key moments leading up to catastrophic events

programme.title: Witches: A Century of Murder
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb's investigation into the notorious 17th-century witch trials concludes with a profile of Matthew Hopkins, the opportunistic puritan witch-hunter who transformed paranoia about Satanism into a lucrative business as he hanged hundreds of people for crimes they could not possibly have committed. Making use of contemporary reports, Suzannah paints a portrait of a man who believed he could cross any boundary and break any law to achieve his goals. Naming himself 'Witchfinder General', Hopkins toured the country charging fees for his services, but Suzannah's research reveals that ultimately, the public's distaste for witches was not as strong as its hatred of being conned by charlatans. Hopkins would eventually die of tuberculosis in relative obscurity, but his malign legacy lived on across the Atlantic, as witch-hunts began in Salem, Massachusetts

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Paul Binski investigates the period after the Second World War, which saw the birth of a modern style of ecclesiastical architecture. He visits Coventry and Chichester cathedrals to highlight the contemporary designs

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice suggests improvements for a four-bedroom dormer bungalow in Clapham, West Sussex, to make it more appealing to prospective buyers. The lurid wall colours and pink living room carpet are banished, leaving pine floorboards that help create a sense of the outdoors

programme.title: Dark Command (1940)
programme.desc: A teacher is defeated in his ambition to become the marshal of his town during the early years of the American Civil War, so he turns renegade instead. Before long he has a reputation as a feared raider fighting on the side of the South, and it falls to the newly appointed lawman whose job he coveted to stop his reign of terror. Western, starring John Wayne and Walter Pidgeon

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)
programme.desc: Fearless hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a host of other characters from Victorian literature - including Captain Nemo, the Invisible Man, Tom Sawyer and Dr Jekyll - to put a stop to the nefarious Fantom's evil plot to bring about a world war. Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery in his final screen role, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran

programme.title: American Woman (2018)
programme.desc: In a small blue-collar town in Pennsylvania lives Debra Callahan, a 32-year-old woman's whose teenage daughter Bridget goes missing. Left to raise her infant grandson alone, Debra seeks the answers behind Bridget's disappearance. Director Jake Scott's drama, starring Sienna Miller, Christina Hendricks, Sky Ferreira and Kentucker Audley

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key (2018)
programme.desc: A parapsychologist returns to her family home to investigate supernatural disturbances. Fourth instalment in the horror saga, starring Lin Shaye, Angus Sampson, Leigh Whannell and Spencer Locke

programme.title: Drowning by Numbers (1988)
programme.desc: Cissie Colpitts drowns her husband after becoming sick of his philandering ways, and enlists the aid of local coroner Madgett to cover up her crime. However, when the spouses of Cissie's identically named daughter and granddaughter meet similar fates, the unfortunate Madgett is cajoled into hiding yet more murders. Black comedy, starring Joan Plowright, Juliet Stevenson, Joely Richardson and Bernard Hill

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters

programme.title: Captain Scarlett (1953)
programme.desc: A brave nobleman forms a band of outlaws to free 19th-century French villagers from the tyranny of an evil duke, reclaim his birthright and save a lovely princess from a fate worse than death at the hands of a lecherous count. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Richard Greene, Leonora Amar, Nedrick Young and Manolo Fabregas

programme.title: Wake of the Red Witch (1948)
programme.desc: A ship owner and his embittered captain engage in a battle of wills as they fight for the love of the same woman and embark on a quest for a treasure chest of pearls hidden in the den of an octopus in the South Seas. Romantic seafaring adventure, starring John Wayne, Luther Adler, Gig Young, Gail Russell and Adele Mara

programme.title: The Cassandra Crossing (1976)
programme.desc: A fleeing terrorist infects transcontinental rail passengers with a deadly virus - prompting the authorities to consider re-routing the train across a dangerously unstable bridge, hoping it will collapse and kill everyone on board to prevent the contagion spreading. Disaster epic, starring Burt Lancaster, Richard Harris, Martin Sheen and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Footloose (2011)
programme.desc: A teenager from Boston moves to a small conservative town, and discovers the council and a preacher have enforced a ban on loud music and dancing. He openly defies the harsh rules, revitalising the local youth and winning the heart of the reverend's daughter. Remake of the 1984 drama, with Kenny Wormald, Julianne Hough and Dennis Quaid

programme.title: War of the Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: A divorced father's rare weekend with his two estranged children descends into horror when alien war machines rise from beneath Earth and begin to systematically destroy every human being in their path - leaving the man with the dangerous task of getting his kids to safety. Steven Spielberg's sci-fi thriller, based on HG Wells' novel, with Tom Cruise, Dakota Fanning, Justin Chatwin, Miranda Otto and Tim Robbins

programme.title: Dark Encounter (2019)
programme.desc: In 1982, an eight-year-old girl goes missing. One year later, at her memorial service, strange happenings befall Maisie's hometown of Blue Hill County, Pennsylvania. Are the events connected? Writer/director Carl Strathie's sci-fi thriller, starring Laura Fraser, Alice Lowe, Grant Masters and Mel Raido

programme.title: The House of Mirth (1999)
programme.desc: A spirited woman in 1920s New York dreams of marrying a wealthy man. Her desire for riches leads her to ignore her feelings for a poverty-stricken friend, and instead embark on a whirlwind tour of high society - but the machinations of another woman make her a pariah. Drama, based on the novel by Edith Wharton, starring Gillian Anderson, Eric Stoltz and Dan Aykroyd

programme.title: Arabian Nights (1942)
programme.desc: The story of two half-brothers - one the heroic caliph, the other an evil usurper - as they do battle for the right to rule their kingdom, and win the hand of beautiful dancer Sherazade. Adaptation of the classic adventure tales, starring Jon Hall, Maria Montez, Sabu and Leif Erickson

programme.title: Shane (1953)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunfighter intervenes when a man and his family are threatened by a predatory cattle baron determined to force every homesteader in the valley off the land. The situation rapidly escalates into violence, while an unspoken attraction develops between the gunman and the settler's wife. Western, starring Alan Ladd, Jack Palance, Van Heflin and Jean Arthur. Based on the novel by Jack Schaefer

programme.title: Kansas Raiders (1950)
programme.desc: A young Jesse James and his allies join a band of rebels fighting a guerrilla campaign for the Confederates during the American Civil War. The experience gives the future outlaw his first taste of crime, but he grows increasingly disillusioned at the atrocities committed by the leader of the raiders. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Brian Donlevy and Tony Curtis

programme.title: To Hell and Back (1955)
programme.desc: Biopic of actor Audie Murphy, following his service in the Second World War. Enlisting in the Army as a teenager to support his younger siblings, he excelled himself in action in the conflict in Europe and became one of America's most decorated soldiers. Starring Murphy as himself alongside Marshall Thompson, Charles Drake and Gregg Palmer

Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

In France, a family renovating a gite wonder if they've bitten off more than they can chew and two new bar-owners in Spain welcome the first tourists of the season

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Cholmeley Arms in Burton-le-Coggles, Lincolnshire, where chef John Berry and his wife Lesley hold a sausage-making competition for their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Islington Mill B&B in Salford, where Joe Spencer and Louise Woodcock have an alternative hosting style as their drag alter egos

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third host Peter Morris welcomes guests to the Pebbles B&B in Seaton, Devon, but despite his breakfast award, not all of the guests are impressed by his culinary offerings

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Tarr Farm Inn on Exmoor, where Hilary Lester and Stacey Wade are proud of their five-star standards. However, Peter is on the warpath after his feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the last day of the competition and there is tension in the air, as Cholmeley Arms hosts John and Lesley want to get to the bottom of Peter's comments

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A company takes on the case of an ex-mayor of Wokingham, and uncovers his devotion to the local community. Plus, the story of a Jewish child's evacuation from Nazi Germany, and details of unclaimed estates where heirs are still to be found

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, keepers prepare for the difficult task of transporting giraffe Kidepo to a new zoo, and Kidepo's brother Narus is not making the move any easier. Meanwhile, silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, and after diving headfirst into an empty pool one too many times, keepers decide a trip to the vet is in order for caiman lizard Gary to see if there is an underlying problem. Elsewhere, dominant warthog Magnum is being challenged by fellow warthog Dobby, so keepers decide it is time to move Dobby to a zoo in Germany

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge fixes up his temperamental van at his chateau. Erin and JB start work on their honeymoon suite and solarium/sun room; with a little help from their friends. Alison and Paul make an exciting discovery with an underground chamber, which they transform into a bedroom complete with arrow hole window

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Design engineer Joe Stuart and service designer Lina Nilsson take on the London property market, as they build their own home on a small 38-square-metre plot. Joe designs a split-level house that will cleverly maximise the space, but the project soon runs months behind schedule, and thousands of pounds over their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw take on one of their most obscure cars to date - a little-known Cannon trials competition car, the Goldfinger

programme.title: How to Build
programme.desc: The construction of a Quattroporte super saloon at the Maserati factory in Turin. From using aerospace technology and techniques from robot assembly, to emu feather dusting in the paint shop, we see how this luxurious saloon is built with a Ferrari engine at its heart

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cyclist Stephen, who's 48, has severely damaged his ankle after coming off his bike deep in woodland in Surrey, and doctors treat a man rushed in after collapsing with a suspected stroke in his garden. Meanwhile, Bridget, who's 70, broke her wrist when she slipped on a mountain path in Greece

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw take on one of their most obscure cars to date - a little-known Cannon trials competition car, the Goldfinger

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Meanwhile, Bridget, who's 70, broke her wrist when she slipped on a mountain path in Greece

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton uncovers something surprising about small hens' eggs, Matt Tebbutt tracks down where the bubbles in beer come from, and Jimmy Doherty investigates why supermarket burgers should not be eaten when the meat is still pink

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enlists the help of paper-cutting expert Poppy Chancellor to make personalised wedding invitations for a couple about to tie the knot. Plus, the inventive presenter creates a craft collage to celebrate the arrival of a newborn baby

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Elaine and Patrick Scott from Lancaster are both history buffs with a passion for the 1940s, and want to move permanently to Normandy in France. Drawn by rich culture and history, they're after a home in the Manche area. Laura Hamilton shows them five properties for their £140,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Surrey and Middlesex. Henry restores a pair of racing go-karts to race against restorer Guy, and Simon repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The search is on for relatives of a Korean War veteran who died in London, and as the case progresses the team is able to help someone meet family members she did not know she had. Plus, the story of a Shropshire woman whose collection of assets included jewellery with a very royal connection, and details of unclaimed estates where heirs still need to be found

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A French renovation project hits crisis point and a family moves to the Costa del Sol to open their dream bar on a very limited budget. Plus, how will Spain's latest hoteliers deal with the feedback from their first guests?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the Bridge Hotel in Scunthorpe and its new owners, Martin and Hannah Weaver. However, visitors Rob and Michelle from Seashells B&B find a condom by the entrance and Clare and Fran from The New Court Hotel are concerned about cleanliness. Tom and Samara from The Crown at Whitchurch think the rooms are little more than functional. Martin and Hannah try to impress their guests at breakfast by introducing them to their pet pig, but there are issues with eggs, but some harsh feedback disappoints the pair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Seashells B&B in Sutton-on-Sea, where owners Michelle and Rob Earp hope their simple residence with an animal twist will win the day. Given Michelle and Rob criticised the Bridge Hotel, Martin and Hannah give their room a thorough going over and find all manner of issues. The self-service breakfast buffet receives some tough criticism in the morning, and Rob and Michelle are angry about their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Crown at Whitchurch in Herefordshire, where ex-army man Tom Jones runs the pub B&B with his step-daughter Samara Cohen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the New Court Hotel in Usk, managed by Clare Davies, who faces complaints include peppery eggs and missing mushrooms at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores after being offended by some of the feedback they have received

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers try to establish the value of a Lincolnshire railway man's estate by visiting his last known address, and uncover the story of his military service in Aden, Yemen. Meanwhile, another case is complicated by a family's numerous name changes. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates are divulged

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Thirty seven-year-old elephant Thi is pregnant for the ninth time but the keepers believe she is now three months' overdue. The risks for Thi and her unborn calf are growing by the day, and the staff are worried. Rampant male Rothschild giraffe Meru causes problems for the giraffe herd as he relentlessly chases the females, and male clownfish Polo gets injured while fighting with the other males for the attentions of dominant female Rosie. However, clownfish can change sex at will, and Polo's time alone in an isolation tank produces a surprising side effect

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB host a 90th birthday party, but the cooking proves challenging and JB has a near disaster with his boar roast. May and her family start work on turning a rundown outbuilding into a yoga retreat. For Tim and Margreeth, it's the day of the wedding party, but the venue - the shed in the woods - isn't quite finished. With hungry guests waiting to be fed, the bride and groom are getting increasingly anxious

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Following the work of Ed and Rowena Waghorn as they continue to build a handcrafted, five-bedroom house on an eight acre smallholding in Herefordshire, 10 years in the making. Progress on the build was slow as Ed decided to do most of the work himself, and after four years the house was still a shell. In 2012 Kevin McCloud decided to follow the build for another five years. In the end, it's just possible this house might have turned out to be a masterpiece

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in rural Somerset, where Tom and Laura are building a home on Tom's family's farm - a dream he has had since childhood. But despite years of planning, Charlie discovers a slight issue with the couple's plans - they don't have any

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Perth couple Angelo and Kasi love the bulky concrete buildings from the 1950s. But when they see the plans for their new family home, there are a few surprises. Will they embrace the unique design? Presented by Peter Maddison

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Gary, 50, is brought into St George's hospital by ambulance after a garage collapsed and fell on his legs. His wife Peta joins him, while Maggie, 83, comes in to A&E with suspected sepsis. She's joined by her son and daughter, who also deal with the fact their mother has lung cancer. Plus, cameras follow one-year-old George, who is rushed in with his mother after drinking nail varnish remover

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Sara Pascoe taking on Jon Richardson and Josh Widdicombe. Susie Dent is joined by Alex Horne and the Horne Section in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton explores the rising trend for camel milk, Jimmy Doherty finds out why supermarket fresh pasta lasts so long and Matt Tebbutt investigates whether it Is it worth spending more money on standard products over value brand ones

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits the world's largest jelly bean producers to discover what they are made of instead of gelatine, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why maple syrup is so expensive

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rosemarie Clarke and Jeff John from London are looking for the perfect holiday home on the Caribbean island of St Lucia. Rosemarie was born in Jamaica, while Jeff's family are from St Lucia. Danni Menzies shows them five properties for their budget of £175,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Nantwich and Stoke-on-Trent, where Henry comes across a 1960s moped, and Simon restores an early Mirror Dinghy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detectives search for the beneficiaries to an unclaimed estate worth £11,000, but they have their work cut out as the deceased has one of the most popular Welsh surnames - Jones. Plus, the hunt for the relatives of a Cheshire man reveals a family connection to the golden age of British coach travel

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Just hours after moving in to their new Spanish home, a family must battle to avoid eviction. In France, a couple look for ways to fund the construction of their home and business, and the owners of a Spanish bar take on a mission to climb the review rankings

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The Admiral Hotel in central London, run by owner So Shaw and hotel manager Kevin Jankunas. Chris Foster and his German companion Christel Richter are floored by the London prices, and Ursula Beswick and Daria Pakalnicka question the quality of the facilities. Despite So and Kevin's best efforts to charm their guests, a dinner conversation leaves Kris Malde and Vikki Cheatham making accusations of sexism and So and Kevin are outraged by some of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to The Redstone in Blackpool, where high-end hotelier Ursula Beswick and manager Daria Pakalnicka hope their luxury guest house will win the day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Foster and Christel Richter invite the hoteliers to Ann's Farmhouse in the suburbs of Bradford, West Yorkshire, but tensions remain high between So, Kevin, Kris and Vikki

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the R Inn in Desborough, owned by Kris Malde. However, when simmering tensions between the guests boil over, one of them refuses to stay the night

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: As the B&B owners meet for the last time, bones of contention include a missing biscuit, marks on a toilet seat and one guest is confronted about why they refused to stay the night. There are harsh words and home truths before the overall winner is revealed

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers are on the rock in Ireland, searching for the beneficiaries to the estate of a Limerick-born man. Another case reveals the compulsive hoarding habits of a car enthusiast, and uncovers a potentially highly valuable collection of Dinky toys. Meanwhile, the work of the team brings about an emotional family reunion

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chimp Zee Zee gives birth to a daughter and keepers hope her arrival will have a calming influence on the others. Meanwhile, chameleon Mr Parsons is set up with a young female, banteng mother Naya struggles to bond with her newly born calf, and elephant Nadita should be looking after baby Anjan, but would rather play with her boisterous cousin, Aayu

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: When Erin and JB can't fix the doors back onto their solarium, Dick Strawbridge steps in to help them find a solution to their rusted hinges. Another leak is found, but this time from the roof, so they call in some professional climbers to scale their bell tower to find the source of the problem. With wedding season over, Tim and Margreeth launch a foodie weekend. With a professional chef hired to produce the food and some trainee butlers on hand to serve more than 20 guests, the couple can take it easy - apart from foraging for mushrooms, dressing the dining room and fixing a guest's belt. Meanwhile, May and her son Jack get the yoga room ready for the imminent arrival of guests.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows plumber Jon Martin and ceramicist Noreen Jaafar as they transform a neglected half-acre site in Gloucestershire. However, they are unable to cut down the 27 protected trees on the plot, so their solution is to build a big, modern treehouse with stilts screwed into the earth and balconies that will have views for miles

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, Jenny investigates a dismembered body found in Crother's Woods, while Ross struggles with his dad's death. Canadian crime drama, starring Serinda Swan and Ehren Kassam

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Thirty-one-year-old Alison is brought in after being kicked with such force by a horse that her leg was broken, while 12-year-old cyclist Harry is also treated for leg injuries, after being involved in a 10-bike pile-up at a velodrome. The staff at St George's also have to deal with 48-year-old Tony, who was riding pillion with his father when their motorbike was involved in a crash, leaving them both badly injured, with Tony having to be flown in to the hospital by emergency helicopter

programme.desc: Melanie is determined to find proof of Jakob's misdeeds so she can save her friendship with Olivia, who has received a life-threatening diagnosis. Saskia is reunited with a past lover who reveals a different side to her

Danni Menzies rises to the challenge to find them the perfect property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Former pub landlady Janice Gibson wants to swap her Newcastle lifestyle for a new start in the Mar Menor area of southern Spain, so Laura Hamilton shows her a selection of properties starting from around £55,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marketing manager Stephanie Hale hosts the first party in Nottingham, where her guests are local councillor Alex Foster, beauty therapist Janice Overton, project engineer Brian Hodges and businessman Barry Dickman. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Local councillor Alex Foster throws the second party in Nottingham, hoping to impress with his French menu and a spot of bell-ringing for entertainment. However, one guest likens the host's starter to cat food, while another criticises his home's tidiness

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty therapist Janice Overton hosts a 1970s-themed dinner party in Nottingham. The guests seem to be in the mood when they arrive suitably dressed for the occasion, but they soon begin to feel uncomfortable as one of them reveals that he is not keen on a fellow diner

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engineer Brian Hodges hosts the penultimate dinner party in Nottingham. Knowing his skills are limited, he decides to rope in his local butcher to help out in the kitchen, borrows cutlery from a pub and persuades a friend's daughters to waitress for him

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party animal Barry Dickman hosts the final dinner party in Nottingham, hoping his Greek-themed night will be enough for him to win the competition. His guests are served the country's traditional cuisine and are encouraged to dance, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie gets green-fingered as she sets out to restore the chateau's original greenhouse, which has recently been damaged in a storm. Lee and Belinda continue to expand their new outdoor venue. When their first wedding falls through, they fortunately get a new booking for a 60th birthday, but then end up in a race against time to get the garden party ready. With 12 acres of land to enjoy, Dick and Angel make sure their Wellington boots have a home, creating bootjacks for the newly renovated boot room

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Steve have been visiting Fuerteventura every year for the past decade and now they want their own bolthole in the resort of Costa de Antigua. Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas lines up five stunning properties for widowed Maria, who wants to start a new life around the stunning lake and town of Viñuela in Málaga, on a budget of £250,000

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George discovers some of the UK's most impressive historic homes, as he is granted special access to some of these extraordinary places, delving into the hidden recesses that visitors don't normally get to see. In this first episode, George's journey begins in Dorset at the UK's most exquisite example of Italianate architecture - the magnificent 17th-century Kingston Lacy. He uncovers a tale of shame and scandal on the south coast, and the beautiful Cotswold landmark - Hidcote Manor Gardens - in full bloom takes his breath away. George also mines the history of the country's last cave dwellers at one of Britain's best-kept secrets, the Rock Houses at Kinver Edge, and finally, with his husky Loki, takes a walk at spectacular Studland Bay, part of the Jurassic Coast World Heritage Site

programme.title: Titanic: Into the Heart of the Wreck
programme.desc: Capturing the underwater odyssey of the greatest Titanic expeditions and the evolution of the most scrutinised shipwreck in the world. From the epic discovery of the wreck by a French-American team in 1985 to the exploratory missions led by James Cameron, who managed to light the wreck scene like a Hollywood film set and venture inside the ship thanks to remote-controlled robots, this documentary captures the unequalled thrill of those extreme dives

programme.title: Catching Paedophiles: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Film exploring the challenges of investigating and prosecuting child sexual abuse, and how to manage predators when they've been caught. Detective Claire Lyons, who works for Hampshire Constabulary's Internet Child Abuse Team, has to prove that her suspicions are right about a man who has been uploading indecent images of children - and not risk any mistakes that would lead to the suspect walking free and being able to offend again

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedic Rob and technician Mike rush to a 21-month-old baby who has fallen unconscious in Kidderminster, while two men collapse in a pub in Coventry

programme.title: The Money Maker
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and investor Eric Collins heads to Birmingham to visit frozen meal delivery company Winny's Meals. Shaun Sookoo started his Caribbean-inspired food company three years ago when he decided to turn his mum's home-cooked meals into a business and had friends queuing round to block to buy them. The business has been expanding at an exponential rate but when Eric looks at the figures, he is shocked to discover serious problems. Not only are customers no re-ordering, but Shaun's mother is not involved any more

programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.desc: Medical insurance boss Zac Kwintner hosts the first dinner party in Gloucestershire, making a traditional Jewish chicken soup, steak fondue and a rich chocolate orange tart. programme.desc: Mature student Gerry Hill hosts the second party in Gloucestershire, and hopes to spice up the competition with an Egyptian-themed feast. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Web designer Marc Harris hosts the penultimate dinner party in Gloucestershire. He is confident his Spanish menu will win over his fellow diners and is determined to put a halt to Zac's rude behaviour, but his plans go downhill when he makes a mess of his starter

programme.desc: Council worker Ameena Cott hosts the final dinner party in Gloucestershire, and hopes to impress with a glamorous evening, which includes colour co-ordinating her dress to match her dog's outfit and making a birdcage centrepiece from a melon. Dick saves cash by getting creative on a new lighting project for Angel's treasury

programme.desc: Anna Richardson and a team of cost-cutting experts offer viewers tips on saving money and sorting out their homes

programme.desc: After a physically and psychologically intense introduction to their SAS selection, the obstacle for the 17 remaining recruits to overcome over the next 48 hours is fear, as they are sent deeper into the wild and unforgiving terrain of the Isle of Raasay in Scotland. They are put through their paces in a forward abseil, exposed to extreme cold in a water immersion exercise and required to operate as a team in a pitch-black disused tunnel

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness
programme.desc: Contestants' general knowledge is put to the test as they play for the chance to win £25,000. However, the more answers the quizzers know, the dafter they must look to prove it. This first instalment features Dave, Hayley, Tharun and Saundra, who fight it out for a shot at the jackpot, facing tricky questions on anything from Captain Cook to Kelly Brook

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couple's two children are struggling to save the business from their parents' disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro, to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: Frank's birthday sees Doofus, Mary and Aine willing to gift him an intervention - his life's stuck in a cycle, and they want him to break free. Their bid coincides with the return of one of Mary's old flames, Liam - a self-described 'wild rover' who's never really grown up. His arrival gives Frank the chance to see what his life will be like if he doesn't turn things around. Brendan Gleeson guest stars, with Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: A Very Royal Baby: From Cradle to Crown
programme.desc: As the world awaits the imminent arrival of Harry and Meghan's second child, this documentary celebrates what it really means to be born royal. A combination of archive footage and interviews provides an insight into every stage of the royal baby story, looking at the pressures faced by royal mums-to-be and how attitudes have changed over the past 100 years. How does press intrusion compares with the birth of Meghan's babies? Why have the royals moved from home to private hospitals? And what really happened at Meghan's baby shower?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Villa Farm Cottage in Thornton Curtis in Lincolnshire, where perfectionist Petra Coates and her partner Martin Littlefield run a tight ship. When the guests arrive, the bathroom tiles take Andrew back to his public swimming pool days and Mark has a moan about a missing en suite. In the morning, the guests are spoilt for choice as Petra provides a German cold meat feast followed by an English breakfast cooked by Martin. However, Andrew and Qidi's feedback about the tiling leaves Martin and Petra planning to hit back on payment day

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Essex, married couple Karen and DJ Paul are first to host with their Ibiza-themed evening. They are joined by outdoorsy Lucy and her partner Paul, who is left hungry in every course. The third couple are Zimbabwean social worker Pat and her husband Tino who are blown away by the entertainment - but not so much by the food. On day two, Pat and Tino are determined to deliver a winning Zimbabwean evening with big portions to satisfy Paul. But their unconventional dessert of mashed sweet potato proves a little too adventurous for their guests. Finally, it's Lucy and Paul's chance to show off their outdoorsy grub but their menu involves a lot of cooking on the night, leaving them stressed out while their guests are waiting

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Steve have been visiting Fuerteventura every year for the past decade and now they want their own bolthole in the resort of Costa de Antigua. Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps south London couple Simone and Carlton Campbell search for a new home on Barbados. They have a budget of £150,000 and hope they can achieve their 17-year dream of moving to the island after they enjoyed their first holiday there as a couple, and returned five years later to be married

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Angela and Michael Sidebotham from Lincolnshire are ready to fulfil their life-long dreams of buying a home in Davenport, Florida, where they plan to spend half of each year. With a budget of £160,000, Sara Damergi shows the couple five properties that meet their requirements

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hair and beauty tutor April Richards hosts the first dinner party in Birmingham. She plans a starter of zebra meat, but the dish does not go down well with employment adviser Paz Thakrar, who is a strict vegetarian and thinks that even eating vegetables is cruel

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Scientist John Fennel hosts the second party in Birmingham, and decides to prepare an ambitious menu that makes use of his skills in the lab. His culinary experiments include the use of soda-siphoned fish batter, a specially crafted fire-maker, a tandoor chimney, and ice-cream made with nitrogen oxide

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner party in Birmingham is hosted by banker Vanessa Erigbogbo, who describes herself as a brilliant cook. She hopes to impress her guests with a classy menu of lobster, confit of duck, and fried grasshopper canapes, but forgets to cater for a vegetarian diner

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Strict vegetarian Paz Thakrar hosts the penultimate dinner party in Birmingham, but his meat-eating guests show little enthusiasm for the menu and are further displeased by the idea of a karaoke session afterwards

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Insolvency administrator Toni Shukla hosts the final dinner party in Birmingham, and appears to have a good chance of securing the £1,000 prize after her rivals' unsuccessful evenings. However, her lack of cookery knowledge threatens to scupper her hopes of gaining the most points

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul move into their new home in western France, but struggle with the language, while Adam from Warwickshire is hoping to join the band of expat chateau owners

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Dartmoor couple Maria and Andy met on Cyprus 20 years ago, got married there and now plan to live there permanently. They're particularly fond of Famagusta, and want a home that will work for them and their much-loved cat Keo. With their budget of £140,000, property expert Jean Johansson lines up five stunning homes for them to choose between

programme.title: A Very Royal Baby: From Cradle to Crown
programme.desc: As the world awaits the imminent arrival of Harry and Meghan's second child, this documentary celebrates what it really means to be born royal. A combination of archive footage and interviews provides an insight into every stage of the royal baby story, looking at the pressures faced by royal mums-to-be and how attitudes have changed over the past 100 years. How does press intrusion compares with the birth of Meghan's babies? Why have the royals moved from home to private hospitals? And what really happened at Meghan's baby shower?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two sets of househunters whose searches were all about family. Retired couple Tom and Sue are living in their motorhome having sold their beloved cottage in Tom's native Yorkshire. The plan is to move 150 miles south to be near Sue's grandson - and they long for an open-plan home with a huge garden. Meanwhile, doting father Charlie, who is recently divorced, and his two children would like a new family home in Kent to start a new chapter in their lives

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
programme.desc: A London neurosurgeon desperate to attend an operation crosses paths with an American bride determined to get to her wedding. When their chartered flight crashes, they attempt to survive in the wilderness, while fighting their attraction to each other. Romantic adventure, starring Idris Elba, Kate Winslet and Beau Bridges

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In the series grand final, Charlotte Ritchie stumbles into some sand, Lee Mack dunks Little Alex Horne and Sarah Kendall stacks fish fingers. Meanwhile, Jamali Maddix staggers around a bit and Mike Wozniak staggers absolutely everyone - again - all in a bid to secure the most coveted prize in television - Greg Davies' golden head nestled on a spike

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A romp through the archive of the unconventional dating show, beginning with assorted 'oh my god!' moments, and catching up with some of the most famous participants. They include Judith, the breast cancer survivor from series five who played The Lord Is My Shepherd to the potential dates and made them a Victoria sponge

programme.title: Catching Paedophiles: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Film exploring the challenges of investigating and prosecuting child sexual abuse, and how to manage predators when they've been caught. Detective Claire Lyons, who works for Hampshire Constabulary's Internet Child Abuse Team, has to prove that her suspicions are right about a man who has been uploading indecent images of children - and not risk any mistakes that would lead to the suspect walking free and being able to offend again

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Andy Stakes and Jeanette Hardy, who are building a new house on top of a sheer cliff on the west coast of Scotland. The pair want to spend £250,000 on a two-bedroom, glass-fronted and earth-sheltered home for themselves and their two beloved Newfoundland dogs. However, construction on such an exposed site is fraught with danger and the pair face no end of problems throughout the build, and a last minute design change that begs the biggest question: even if Andy finishes the house, will Jeanette actually like it?

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: The launch of the site is just days away, but Johnny's last-minute design changes for his Maltese bus, including hand painting more than 200 tiles for the shower, are driving craftsman Pauleo to despair. Meanwhile, Bev is putting the finishing touches to the site up in Yorkshire before Johnny arrives to inspect the first of the vehicles, , including a converted American school bus and a beautifully restored Morris Minor Caravanette

Local heavy metal star Jonny Hellraiser tries to attract customers to his 1950s-style diner by introducing 'the world's biggest breakfast'. Business is hectic for wedding planner Louise, although she has not heard from her latest couple for weeks and has no idea how many guests are due

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A vital piece of track-insulating equipment has failed, throwing train services into chaos, while a nasty surprise awaits engineers as they discover rotten wooden sleepers that disintegrate under foot. Plus, veteran staff are shocked by the reason the 15:00 to Bristol has come to a halt - a driver has tried to start the train from the wrong end, leading it to automatically shut down

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Extreme cleaners Richard and Brennan travel to Gateshead to help 40-year-old sci-fi collector Abi, whose massive horde of toys, posters and films has completely taken over her home

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers have their hands full over the festive period as party-going drunks end up getting behind the wheel, while the stresses of surviving Christmas lead to late night argy-bargy and screaming matches. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: An edition focusing on high-speed pursuits, revealing the judgement calls officers must make while weighing the dangers against the chances of capturing their suspects. On the M1, Karl hits speeds of 155mph to intercept a getaway car used by a gang of suspected thieves, but as he waits for other units to arrive his cover is blown and the target vehicle makes a run for it

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A foul-mouthed pensioner pushes Barry's patience to the limit, Sarah gives a bad-boy biker an early birthday present and Jim's Audi S3 is outclassed by a car 30 years its senior. Plus, Mike is left open-mouthed when he encounters a drink-driver who is three times over the limit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jim is on the trail of a speeding motorcyclist, Jon reveals his guilty pleasure when he retrieves a stolen caravan and dog handler Barry is brought to book by a would-be lawyer. Meanwhile, Sarah deals with the aftermath of a drunken brawl between two brothers

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jim intercepts a car containing cannabis, a late-night reveller talks himself into trouble and Sgt Baxter has his work cut out when confronted by a dishonest driver. Plus, young drivers get a crash course in how to deal with skids at a training session run by the unit at RAF Scampton

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of medical emergency teams in the A&E department of Barnsley Hospital, beginning as severe weather conditions place it under even more stress than usual. Dr Julian tends to pensioner Brian who was brought in after breaking his ankle walking his dog in the snow, and the medic also sees former miner Andrew, who has a chronic lung condition. Paediatric consultant Dr Jane is called into action when four-year-old Teddy is rushed in after gashing his head in a sledging accident

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: A near-miss with Terese makes Toadie and Melanie realise they are going to have to be much more secretive with their affair

programme.desc: Jasmine and Tori desperately search for Christian and Lewis. Ziggy plans to end Ari's boredom as it increases and causes irritation for everyone

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: Cameras follow some of the people who have seen their houses and lives destroyed by the terrifying phenomenon of sinkholes

programme.title: Secrets of the Luxury Super Yachts
programme.desc: Documentary following the 'birth' of a new, 65-metre luxury vessel called Life Saga - designed, sold and captained by the best of British boaters. This expose of the secretive world of super yachts also spills the beans on how the super-rich really behave on board their boats, reveals how security teams employ hi-tech tools to defend against pirates, and features the brokers who shake hands on mega-million pound deals

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Security are called to an incident in the Minors waiting room after a violent argument begins between two patients, while 47-year-old factory worker Mark arrives after an industrial accident tore the muscle and skin away from his wedding ring finger. Ian arrives in Resus with a worrying head injury after the 63-year-old fell down a full flight of stairs late at night and Dr Jehad must establish if he has a life-threatening bleed on the brain

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Helen has an aneurysm in her brain that could burst at any time and lead to her death within minutes. For doctor Sanjeev Nayak there are no second chances as he embarks on an extraordinary operation to save his patient. Michael's life is also on a knife edge. After collapsing with a cardiac arrest, he was saved by a neighbour giving him CPR. But now the trauma doctors face a double battle - they must quickly assess his head injury and also remove a clot in his artery that is destroying his heart

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Chesterfield, Jim responds to an urgent call for back-up from his colleague Tom, who is surrounded by an angry mob following a report of a teenager driving dangerously. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers are forced to exercise caution when they stop an uninsured driver who is known to have a violent past, while Jon Peacock and police dog Brad are on the hunt for suspected burglars. Sarah Capes gets a whiff of something illegal, Mike Templeman pulls over a white van with rather too many faults and one unlucky driver discovers that there is no fooling Dan Brigginshaw

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The hunt for a suspected burglar takes an unexpected turn, a late-night stop reveals a bag of drugs, Jon Peacock has a tussle with a fallen tree and Barry Peach deals with a case of some very hot dogs locked inside a car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan Brigginshaw is in hot pursuit of a two-wheeled tearaway, a suspected drunk driver nearly causes a calamity, and Mark has to turn detective at a three-car collision. Meanwhile, Sarah has a communication meltdown with a Mercedes driver

programme.desc: Staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick, and young manager Tom has to use his charm to get the team to commit to working extra shifts. programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow John, who has turned trash into compost cash, and Cathy has found a way to feed her son the very best food for free

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: Return of the documentary taking a look at what can happen when families fall out over money. The first episode examines the case of a teenager cheated out of her grandfather's inheritance by her own dad and stepmother. The pair forged signatures and lied to solicitors and banks to steal the money, then frittered it away on luxuries and paying off their own debts. There is also the story of a pair of identical twins who fell out over a £55,000 loan, and a man who was alleged to have robbed his mother's pension and life savings, but took his own life before justice was done

programme.title: The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex

Temi and Juliet, and Patrick and Eva are helped by Gen, an expert on the psychology of sex, master of anatomy Ali, sex toy aficionado Jade and queen of body confidence Maria

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A psychological profile of the former nurse, who is currently serving 13 life sentences for murdering four children and injuring nine others at Grantham Hospital in Lincolnshire in 1991. Psychologists and criminology experts explore the possible motives for her crimes, examining her behaviour during childhood, when she was known to be an attention seeker

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Sue Mason and Sister Benita Wainwright prepare resus for Rory, a 56-year-old patient who has been found unconscious at home. programme.desc: Katrina, 28, has been hit by a car while crossing the road. Her legs are badly broken but trauma team leader Richard Fawcett worries she might also be suffering from other internal injuries that could put her life at risk. Forty-two-year old Michael has had his second heart attack in two weeks, so staff act quickly to remove a blood clot, and 72-year-old Trevor is brought in after falling off a shed roof. He is losing lots of blood from a head wound, but even worse, he may have broken his neck

Elsewhere, Tom Waters is dispatched to 30-year-old bricklayer Daniel, who has sliced his arm with a power saw. He was cutting timber on a workbench using an angle grinder with a circular blade when he lost control and it sliced through his right hand

programme.desc: A US Marine veteran confesses to the murder of a friend 60 years previously, but Gibbs decides to investigate further rather than take his story at face value, hoping to save the elderly Medal of Honour recipient from a spell in prison. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team arrest an ensign in connection with the death of a Navy commander who had recently undergone surgery, but Abby believes they have got the wrong man. Another fatality soon follows - and it falls to Tony to save his colleagues. Starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine's wife kills an intruder and later claims he tried to rape her. The team embarks on a mystifying wild goose chase through a stack of old case files and eventually discovers the woman was leading a double life while her husband was serving overseas

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony poses as a convict and takes part in a bogus jailbreak as part of an undercover operation to recover millions of dollars' worth of art and archaeological finds looted from Iraq - but disappears while manacled to a murderous fellow inmate. Guest starring Frank Whaley (Pulp Fiction), with Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the death of a woman searching for the whereabouts of her late mother's antique ring. Their trail leads to a deadly doctor who has cleverly concealed the murders of many of his patients. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A married couple are found dead in their hotel room, the husband having succumbed to an overdose. Eames and Goren discover a link to professional party service owner Bernard Fremont, who is suspected of using a team of women to befriend tourists before robbing and killing them. Michael York guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A prostitute's body is found in the ocean, having seemingly fallen from an aeroplane's wheel well - leading Logan and Barek to conclude an airline employee may be to blame. Their investigation leads them to a nervous staff member, but they soon conclude he is too timid to have committed such a crime, and believe someone else may be involved. With special guest star Brad Renfro

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is stabbed to death in her flat, and suspicion initially falls on her boyfriend Hank, a known drug addict trying to sort his life out after being released from prison on parole. His brother Riley, a high-school basketball prodigy, is furious his sibling has let him down in their joint dream of becoming sports stars, but as evidence emerges, it becomes clear to Sid, Hawkes and the team that while Hank may be troubled, he is not a killer. Crime drama, starring Robert Joy and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A fraternity house's initiation ritual turns deadly when a student is killed and another disappears. The detectives discover the deceased man was carrying four mobile phones and that he was the mastermind behind the games, leading them to a cemetery and a sinister money-making scheme

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The team investigates when a recruiting officer at the NYPD Academy is killed, while Castle makes a decision with profound consequences for him and Beckett

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: One of Esposito's old cases is re-examined by Castle and Beckett because of a clue left at a crime scene involving the murder of an armoured car driver. Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic star

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to see how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Footage includes communities fighting back as neighbourhood watch takes on new meaning, thugs on a housing estate caught in the act, and an elderly resident attacking an intruder with her walking stick

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A daytime soap queen's husband is shot dead - but, luckily, one of her neighbours just happens to be amateur sleuth Jessica Fletcher. With Angela Lansbury. Guest starring Kate Mulgrew (Star Trek: Voyager)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine's wife kills an intruder and later claims he tried to rape her. The team embarks on a mystifying wild goose chase through a stack of old case files and eventually discovers the woman was leading a double life while her husband was serving overseas

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony poses as a convict and takes part in a bogus jailbreak as part of an undercover operation to recover millions of dollars' worth of art and archaeological finds looted from Iraq - but disappears while manacled to a murderous fellow inmate. Guest starring Frank Whaley (Pulp Fiction), with Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl is found suffocated to death in Central Park, Briscoe and Green discover her adoptive mother's attempts to discipline the child may have inadvertently caused the tragedy. However, the case is thrown into confusion when a post-mortem reveals she may actually have died of an allergic reaction. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is found dead in an apartment building, and Briscoe and Green suspect an improper website may have played a part in her murder. As McCoy and Southerlyn investigate the case further, they realise the victim's best friend, who was reluctant to come forward as a witness, may provide the answers. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse L Martin and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives probe the shooting of a motorist, and arrest a man who helped the victim change a tyre on his car shortly before he was killed. The suspect protests his innocence, and points the investigators in the direction of another man who admits to the crime and even signs a confession, but further inquiries cast doubt on his guilt. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the stabbing of a teacher whose body has been found in a caretaker's cupboard. The hunt for her killer leads to the discovery that she was caught up in a love triangle at school involving a student with multiple identities. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a female rock singer, who apparently died of an overdose of cocaine and heroin. However, their inquiry is hampered by the appearance of a retired officer using unorthodox research tactics to find out the truth. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Investigations into a stolen credit card lead Briscoe and Curtis to a pair of teenage lovers who may have killed their newborn son and disposed of the body. The couple strenuously deny any wrongdoing - but the discovery of a decomposing baby's finger adds weight to the evidence against them. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A private investigator finds the body of a missing Navy officer in a car at the bottom of a lake and Gibbs reluctantly allows him to assist the investigation into the cause of death. The promise of a $1million reward proves to be a major incentive for the outsider, and the discovery of a bullet leads to suspicions that the man was murdered

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The suspected murder of a petty officer turns out to be a ghoulish practical joke - but a genuine death follows shortly afterwards. As inquiries proceed, local investigators are also assigned to the case - and prove to have personal characteristics remarkably similar to those of Gibbs's staff. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky identifies two dismembered bodies as those of a prosecutor and a sheriff he worked with on a rape case 10 years previously, and realises he could be the killer's next target. Despite Gibbs' attempts to protect him, he is later kidnapped - and the team's search for clues leads to a macabre showdown at a funeral home. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: Syd and McKenna get closer to Knox, but a shocking revelation makes their fight even more personal

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called in to investigate the death of a billionaire radio mogul's eldest son, whose body has been found covered in latex paint. Evidence initially implicates the victim's much younger stepmother - but as the case unfolds, a complicated series of intertwined relationships is revealed. With guest star Malcolm McDowell

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate when an undercover secret service agent is found murdered in her home. Their first suspect is the victim's husband, but complications quickly arise when her work comes under the microscope, and her husband's nefarious activities for a corrupt Congressman are uncovered. US crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Annabella Sciorra

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A party ends in tragedy when the hostess is killed in what appears to be an accident, but the results from her autopsy suggest foul play. Meanwhile, Danville takes on the case of serial rapist John Curtis, who previously eluded her

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A judge presiding over a triple murder case is killed when he visits a crime scene, leading the team to a pair of suspects who appear to have been exacting revenge after receiving harsh sentences for minor offences. Lindsay is given the opportunity to convict the alleged serial rapist who eluded Danville, but is stumped by a victim's dubious testimony. Crime drama, starring Sela Ward and Anna Belknap

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The murder of a man connected to the smuggling of Turkish relics sends Castle and Beckett on a quest to find a stolen antique believed to be Aladdin's lamp, in the hopes that it can lead them to the killer

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Hayley does a favour for an old friend and finds herself implicated in a killing and a cyber-terror attack, leaving Beckett and Castle to solve the case and clear her name

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the stabbing of a college activist, whose knowledge of a beef supplier's poor sanitary conditions may have led to his death. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a struggling actress in what appears to have been a bungled robbery. When a couple produce a video tape showing the thieves at work, the detectives waste little time in tracking down their suspects. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two thieves discover the skeletal remains of a woman who was believed to have died in the September 11 attacks on the World Trade Centre. It transpires that a valuable and unusual ring has been stolen from the body, and the team suspects foul play. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Elisabeth Rohm and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to prosecute a pilot accused of murdering her married lover for trying to end their relationship, but finds himself battling the Navy and the office of the Judge Advocate General, who seem intent on obstructing his efforts. Acclaimed American detective drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman claims to have witnessed the murder of a sailor, but a lack of physical evidence causes the team to question what actually took place. Spurred by his gut instinct, McGee perseveres in his search for clues and soon discovers there is more to the case than he could have imagined

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to investigate the discovery of a US Marine's body at the foot of a cliff. Gibbs immediately suspects the man's ex-wife and his best friend are guilty of murder, and tries to turn them against each other. Meanwhile, Abby puts her technical skills to the test by trying to repair a camera that was broken during the victim's fall

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The body of a petty officer is found lying in bed next to a barman - but he insists she is not the woman he brought home with him the previous night. The investigation leads Gibbs and the team to the victim's sister (R'n'B star Mya), who is a singer in a rival bartender's dance club. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The squad joins forces with an undercover task force to take down a human trafficking ring. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a man who had illegally obtained medical records to use in a lawsuit involving a child with spina bifida. Tracking down the litigants, they find the court case is at the heart of a web of deceit dating back to before the girl's conception. US crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate the murder of a teenage violinist who has been pushed to her death at a prestigious concert hall. Believing an arrogant opera conductor is the most likely suspect, they focus their inquiries on him - until a medical report changes everything and takes the case in an unexpected new direction. Julian Sands and Alice Krige guest star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case against alleged serial rapist John Curtis is put in jeopardy when he is freed on bail after a witness is declared unreliable. A determined Danville takes another look at the evidence, but when one of the apparent victims is killed, she uncovers a conspiracy to get Curtis convicted - and discovers a possible connection to Senator Matthews. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates when a cage fighter's driving licence is found next to what is assumed to be his charred remains. His wife reveals he was being stalked, but when Jo and Adam find the man who had been harassing him he swears he was not involved. A forensic examination of the corpse suggests the victim may have been another person entirely, and the arrival at the precinct of a confused man covered in blood, petrol and traces of asbestos further complicates the case

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Becket and Castle investigate when a mild-mannered safety inspector for the city manages to survive being poisoned twice.

They begin by throwing a double-walled pot on the wheel, then for the spot test they have to create handles for a set of casserole dishes. Finally, the main challenge sees them making a large clock, which involves slab rolling large amounts of clay to shape, then raw glazing and firing them to produce what they hope will be beautiful timepieces. But for one hopeful, this will have been their last day in the contest. Host Sara Cox breaks the bad news

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: National Treasure
programme.desc: Marie encounters with one of her husband's accusers, and is left shaken by a difficult interview with his barrister. Both experiences leave her questioning whether it was love, or denial, that allowed her to remain loyal to Paul for so long - despite his many affairs. Meanwhile, Gerry manages to dig up some evidence that seems to thoroughly discredit one of Paul's key accusers. However, making use of this new knowledge will mean Paul has to make an uncomfortable decision. Legal drama, starring Robbie Coltrane, Julie Walters and Kerry Fox

programme.title: Sex Ed (2014)
programme.desc: A teacher arrives at a new school, and is appalled to discover his teenage students are receiving no sex education. He takes it upon himself to provide the facts of life, despite objection from the local preacher. However, his plan is complicated by his still being a virgin and falling in love with a pupil's older sister. Comedy, starring Haley Joel Osment and Lorenza Izzo

programme.title: Hot Property (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate spy loses her job after getting caught embezzling, and is no longer able to fund her lavish lifestyle. Comedy, starring MyAnna Buring and Tom Rhys Harries

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v Sri Lanka. Highlights of the opening day of the First Test in the two-match series, which takes place at Lord's. When these sides faced each other in a Test match here in 2011 it finished in a draw, with both teams posting a first innings total in excess of 450

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v Sri Lanka. Highlights of the second day of the First Test in the two-match series, which takes place at Lord's. Five of England's batsmen recorded first-innings scores of over 50 when the sides met here in 2011, with Matt Prior's 126 the standout performance, especially with him coming to the crease with the score on 201-5

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v South Africa. Highlights of the opening day's play in the 2017 First Test, which took place at Lord's

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the second day of the Second Test at Lord's, where the five-match series continued. Stuart Broad recorded a career-best 7-44 in a man-of-the-match second-innings performance against New Zealand here two months ago, while James Anderson became only the fourth Englishman to surpass 300 Test wickets when taking 5-47 in the first innings

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from the third day of the Second Test at Lord's, where the five-match series continued. Then-England captain Andrew Strauss produced a fine first-innings knock of 161 when the sides last met here in this format in 2009 and the hosts went on to win by 115 runs, a victory that meant they finally ended their long winless run in Tests against the Aussies at this venue that spanned all the way back to 1934

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Highlights of the opening day's play in the Fourth Ashes Test, which took place at Trent Bridge in Nottingham. This venue was the setting for the First Test back in 2013, and day one saw a total of 14 wickets fall - England were bowled out for 215 in their first innings and the tourists ended the day on 75/4 in reply. Peter Siddle was the pick of the Australian bowlers, taking 5/50 in 14 overs. No English batsman passed 50, with Jonathan Trott coming closest on 48 before being bowled by Siddle

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Action from day five of the First Test at Trent Bridge, where the opening contest of the five-match series was brought to a conclusion. Having decided to replace their head coach Mickey Arthur with former batsman Darren Lehmann just 16 days prior to the commencement of this series, Australia will have hoped to claim an unlikely victory in this encounter that could spur them on in the coming Test matches

programme.title: Test Match Special
programme.desc: England v India. Commentary on the first day of the Fourth Test at Old Trafford

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v Sri Lanka. Highlights of the third day of the First Test at Headingley, where the three-match series continued

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: South Africa v England. Highlights from day three of the Third Test in the series, held at New Wanderers Stadium in Johannesburg

programme.title: Test Cricket
programme.desc: England v India

programme.title: The Ashes
programme.desc: England v Australia. Highlights from the Emirates Durham International Cricket Ground, where the five-match series continued with the fourth day of the Fourth Test. The touring Australians have been beset by problems on and off the pitch since they arrived in this country, beginning with the ICC Champions Trophy which led into this Test series, but put in a much-improved performance in the Third Test. England have already retained the Ashes following the draw at Old Trafford and can afford to concentrate on producing their best cricket, as they aim to outline their superiority over Australia as the nations play back-to-back Test series to avoid a clash with the 2015 World Cup, which will be held in Australia and New Zealand

programme.title: Live Premier League
programme.desc: Manchester United v Fulham (Kick-off 6.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Old Trafford, as both teams play their penultimate game of the league season. The reverse fixture in January saw the Red Devils come from behind to take all three points, with goals from Edinson Cavani and Paul Pogba cancelling out an early goal from Ademola Lookman. That win saw Ole Gunnar Solksjaer's side extend their unbeaten away record in the Premier League to 17 games.

programme.title: Live Premier League
programme.desc: Burnley v Liverpool (Kick-off 8.15pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Turf Moor, as the home side look to complete a league double against Jurgen Klopp's side. The reverse fixture in January saw an Ashley Barnes penalty end Liverpool's 68-game unbeaten run at Anfield. That win also ended a run of seven games without a win for Sean Dyche's side against Liverpool, with the last win coming in August 2016.

programme.title: Live PGA Championship Golf
programme.desc: Coverage of day one of the Major from Kiawah Island Golf Resort's Ocean Course in Kiawah Island, South Carolina, where Collin Morikawa enters as reigning champion. Morikawa won last year's tournament by two shots ahead of Paul Casey and Dustin Johnson, finishing with a score of 13-under-par. Previous winners of this competition include fellow Americans Justin Thomas, Brooke Koepka and Jimmy Walker.
